summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that Cautilus review packet builders keep review prompts, schemas, compare questions, report artifacts, and the report packet on one durable review boundary before variant execution.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the docs/contracts/review-packet.md claim that `cautilus.review_packet.v1` binds review prompts, schema references, compare questions, report artifacts, and the report under review is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: A review variant or external judge provider was invoked
The review prompt wording is behaviorally sufficient
Every adapter compare artifact pattern is proven
Human reviewers always interpret the packet correctly

notableAssertions: the packet keeps the report file and embedded report payload
defaultPromptFile and defaultSchemaFile are collected with existence metadata
artifactFiles and reportArtifacts are collected from adapter paths
comparisonQuestions and humanReviewPrompts are preserved on the same packet
the agent-runtime packet builder emits cautilus.review_packet.v1
adapter artifact paths and report paths resolve to existing file records
comparison questions and human review prompts are copied from the adapter
default prompt and schema references are retained
active-run defaults write review-packet.json before later review execution

decision.reason: The focused Go runtime test and existing agent-runtime test both exercise the packet boundary that binds prompt/schema references, report artifacts, comparison questions, human review prompts, and the report under review into `cautilus.review_packet.v1` before review variants execute.
